Part.Source:
//verifica id da sessao. verificaidsessao.Call(&DevRandon, &IsAcessoConcedido, &IsAtualizaTudo, &wwpContext)
if &IsAcessoConcedido = true //Acesso concedido
if &OqueFazer = 'NOVO'
//get padrao TIPO LANCAMENTO RetornaConfSistema.Call(&wwpContext.EmpCod, &wwpContext.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon098_LctoCte, &CfgVlr) &CteLctCod = val(&CfgVlr) If &CteLctCod = 0 RetornaConfSistema.Call(&wwpContext.EmpCod, &wwpContext.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon019_LctoOrcamento, &CfgVlr) &CteLctCod = val(&CfgVlr) EndIf For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where LctCod = &CteLctCod &sdtCte.CteLctCod = LctCod &sdtCte.CteLctNom = LctNom Exit When none For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.Empcod &sdtCte.CteLctCod = LctCod &sdtCte.CteLctNom = LctNom Exit EndFor EndFor
//&sdtCte.CteTipSer = TipoServicoCte.normal // &sdtCte.CteFinEms = CteFinEms
&sdtCte.sts = 'J200' &sdtCte.obs = '' return
Else For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod
&sdtCte.CteSts = CteSts &sdtCte.CteModCod = CteModCod &sdtCte.CteFinEms = CteFinEms
&sdtCte.sts = 'J200' &sdtCte.obs = ''
do CAse CAse &OqueFazer = 'ORIGINARIOS' &sdtCte.CteTipSer = CteTipSer &sdtCte.cteSts = CteSts
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, CteDocAntCod &originarios = new() &originarios.Cod = CteDocAntCod &originarios.Cnpj = CteDocAntCnpj &originarios.Ins = CteDocAntIns &originarios.Uf = CteDocAntUf &originarios.UfNom = retornaNomeEstado.Udp(EmpCod, CteDocAntUf) &originarios.Raz = CteDocAntRaz &originarios.Chv = CteDocAntChv &sdtCte.ctes.Add(&originarios) EndFor
CAse &OqueFazer = 'AVANCADO'
if CteModCod = '57' &sdtCte.CteModRodRNTRC = CteModRodRNTRC
&sdtCte.CteVlrAvaVar = trim(toformattedString(CteVlrAva)) &sdtCte.CteVlrAceVar = trim(toformattedString(CteVlrAce)) &sdtCte.CteVlrConVar = trim(toformattedString(CteVlrCon)) &sdtCte.CteAveRam = CteAveRam &sdtCte.CteAveCodLim = CteAveCodLim
&sdtCte.CteCiotNro = CteCiotNro &sdtCte.CteDocTra = CteDocTra &sdtCte.CteNroCon = CteNroCon Else if CteIniUfe = CteTerUfe &sdtCte.CteModRodRNTRC = CteModRodNroRegEst Else &sdtCte.CteModRodRNTRC = CteModRodTaf Endif
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteSegCod &sdtCte.CteSegCod = CteSegCod
&sdtCte.CteSegRef = CteSegRef &sdtCte.CteSegNom = CteSegNom &sdtCte.CteSegApl = CteSegApl Exit EndFor
if &sdtCte.CteSegCod.IsEmpty() &sdtCte.CteSegCod = SeguroCte.Emitente Endif Endif
// &sdtCte.CtePesCod = &sdtCte.CteCpfMot = CteCpfMot &sdtCte.CteNomMot = CteNomMot
&sdtCte.CteObsGer = CteObsGer
&sdtCte.CtePla = CtePlc &sdtCte.CtePlaTra = CtePlcTra // &sdtCte.CtePosVei = CtePosVei // &sdtCte.CtePosDocAnt = CtePosDocAnt
Case &OqueFazer = 'CARGA'
Do CAse Case CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento &sdtCte.CteTomChvAnaOri = CteTomChvCpl Case CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao &sdtCte.CteTomChvAnaOri = CteTomChvAnaOri EndCase
If CteModCod = '57' For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteCarCod If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.UNIDADE AND CteCarTip = 'UNIDADE' &sdtCte.CteCarQtdVar = trim(toformattedString(CteCarQtd)) EndIf
If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.M3 and CteCarTip = 'METROS CUBICOS' // &sdtCte.M3CteCarQtd = CteCarQtd EndIf
If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.KG and CteCarTip = 'PESO BRUTO' &sdtCte.BrtCteDocPesVar = trim(toformattedString(CteCarQtd)) EndIf
If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.KG and CteCarTip = 'PESO LIQUIDO' &sdtCte.LiqCteDocPesVar = trim(toformattedString(CteCarQtd)) EndIf EndFor
&sdtCte.CteCarProPre = trim(toformattedString(CteCarProPre)) &sdtCte.CteCarVlrTotVar = trim(toformattedString(CteCarVlrTot))
if &sdtCte.CteCarProPre.IsEmpty() PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', 'WPCTECARGA', &wwpContext.PesCod, &wwpContext.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() If &sdtCte.CteCarProPre.Trim().IsEmpty() &sdtCte.CteCarProPre = trim(Substr(&PadObs,1,60)) EndIf
If &sdtCte.CteCarOtrCar.Trim().IsEmpty() &sdtCte.CteCarOtrCar = trim(Substr(&PadObs,61,30)) EndIf
If &sdtCte.CteSerDes.Trim().IsEmpty() &sdtCte.CteSerDes = trim(Substr(&PadObs,91,30)) EndIf EndIf Endif
//Notas da Carga For EAch Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteDocCod &Carga = new() &Carga.CteDocChvNfe = CteDocChvNfe &Carga.CteDocCod = CteDocCod &Carga.CteDocTip = CteDocTip &Carga.CteDocVlrTotNtf = trim(toformattedString(CteDocVlrTotNtf)) &Carga.CteDocTotPso = trim(toformattedString(CteDocTotPso))
&Numeric = 0 if not CteDocDtaPre.IsEmpty() and not CteDocDtaPre.IsNull() DateTimeToTimestamp.Call(CteDocDtaPre, &Numeric) Endif &Carga.CteDocDtaPre = &Numeric
&sdtCte.carga.Add(&Carga) EndFor Else
&sdtCte.CteTipFrt = CteTipFrt if not CteDtaHorVia.IsEmpty() and not CteDtaHorVia.IsNull() &sdtCte.CteDtaHorViaTmp = DateTimeToTimestamp.Udp(CteDtaHorVia) Endif
&sdtCte.CteTerUfe = CteTerUfe &sdtCte.CteIniUfe = CteIniUfe
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteCarCod If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.UNIDADE AND CteCarTip = 'UNIDADE' &sdtCte.CteCarQtdVar = trim(str(CteCarQtd)) //str para os EndIf EndFor
&sdtCte.CteCarProPre = trim(toformattedString(CteSerDes))
//Ufs de percurso For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, CtePerCod &ufs = new() &ufs.ufPercCod = CtePerCod &ufs.UfPerc = CtePerUfeCod &ufs.UfPercN = RetornaNomeEstado.Udp(EmpCod, CtePerUfeCod) &sdtCte.uf.Add(&ufs) EndFor
Endif
CAse &OqueFazer = 'VALORES'
&sdtCte.CteCfop = CteCfop &sdtCte.CteCfoNom = '' &sdtCte.CteTipSer = CteTipSer
For Each Order CfoCod Where CfoCod = CteCfop &sdtCte.CteCfoNom = CfoDesCpl Exit EndFor
&sdtCte.CteImpCst = CteImpCst &sdtCte.CteImpCstNom = CteImpCst.EnumerationDescription().ToUpper()
&sdtCte.CteVlrTotPreSerVar = trim(toformattedString(CteVlrTotPreSer)) &sdtCte.CteVlrRecSerVar = trim(toformattedString(CteVlrRecSer))
//Componentes For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, CtePreCod &IsTemValores = true if CteVlrPreCom > 0 &IsUmMaiorVazio = true Exit Endif EndFor
if &IsTemValores = false CtePrestaDefault.Call(&wwpContext.EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, 'S') Endif
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, CtePreCod &totalMoeda += CteVlrPreCom &componentes = new() &componentes.CteNomPreCom = CteNomPreCom &componentes.CteVlrPreComVar = trim(toformattedString(CteVlrPreCom)) &componentes.CteDesIcmsCom = CteDesIcmsCom &componentes.CtePrePagCom = CtePrePagCom &componentes.CteMostrar = false if &IsUmMaiorVazio = false and CteNomPreCom = 'FRETE VALOR' &componentes.CteMostrar = true Endif
&sdtCte.comp.Add(&componentes) EndFor
if &totalMoeda.IsEmpty() and CteVlrTotPreSer > 0 for &componentes in &sdtCte.comp if &componentes.CteNomPreCom = 'FRETE VALOR' &componentes.CteVlrPreComVar = trim(toformattedString(CteVlrTotPreSer)) GravaCteComponente.Call(&wwpContext.EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &componentes.CteNomPreCom, CteVlrTotPreSer, &Componentes.CteDesIcmsCom, &Componentes.CtePrePagCom) Endif EndFor ENdif
//recebimentos For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod &recebimento = new() &recebimento.CteDupCod = CteDupCod &recebimento.CteDupFrpPgtoTip = CteDupFrpPgtoTip.ToString() &recebimento.CteDupNro = CteDupNro &recebimento.CteDupVlrVar = trim(toformattedString(CteDupVlr))
DateTimeToTimestamp.Call(CteDupDtaVct, &Numeric) &recebimento.CteDupVctTmp = &Numeric
&sdtCte.receb.Add(&recebimento) EndFor
&sdtCte.CteImpAliVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpAli)) &sdtCte.CteImpVbcVar = '0,00' &sdtCte.CteImpVlrVar = '0,00' &sdtCte.CteImpPerRedVar = '0,00'
if CteImpAli > 0 &sdtCte.CteImpVbcVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpVbc)) &sdtCte.CteImpVlrVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpVlr)) &sdtCte.CteImpPerRedVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpPerRed)) EndIf
&sdtCte.CteImpVlrCreVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpVlrCre))
// &sdtCte.CteImpAliTotTri = CteImpAliTotTri))
&sdtCte.CteImpVbcRetVar = '0,00' &sdtCte.CteImpVstRetVar = '0,00' &sdtCte.CteImpAliRetVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpAliRet)) if CteImpAliRet > 0 &sdtCte.CteImpVbcRetVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpVbcRet)) &sdtCte.CteImpVstRetVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpVstRet)) Endif
&sdtCte.CteImpTriAliInssVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpTriAliInss))
// &sdtCte.CteImpTriVlrPis = CteImpTriVlrPisv)) // &sdtCte.CteImpTriVlrCofins = CteImpTriVlrCofins)) // &sdtCte.CteImpTriVlrCsll = CteImpTriVlrCsll)) &sdtCte.CteImpTriVlrInssVar = trim(toformattedString(CteImpTriVlrInss)) // &sdtCte.CteImpTriVlrIr = CteImpTriVlrIr)) EndCAse
Exit When None &sdtCte.sts = 'J999' &sdtCte.obs = 'CTe não localizado' EndFor Endif Else &sdtCte.sts = 'E999' &sdtCte.obs = 'Nada mais aqui!' return Endif
